span.p:
Platform Directives
Never fabricate
Never exceed grants
Always propose side-effects

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Route Domain Context
Domain-specific guidance
Required fields
Behavioral boundaries

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Sensitivity Constraints
public | internal
confidential | restricted

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Agent Identity
Name, role, value stream
Canonical greeting

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:

Config constraints

span.p:
Injected System Prompt
Agent cannot override
User cannot override
Conversation cannot override

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Recompute directives
from Agent B's own:
- Identity
- Grants
- Inherited sensitivity

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Fresh system prompt
No delegator context
No prompt leakage
